github.copilot.chat.commitMessageGenerat.text: Use Conventional Commits. Reference at least one UC-XXX and the related FR-/NFR- IDs in the body. English only.

github.copilot.chat.pullRequestDescripti.text: Reference all touched UC-XXX and FR-/NFR- IDs. List affected BDD scenarios. State the Definition of Done items completed (tests, coverage, security/privacy checklist, docs).
